title: Add BeDream APP to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [BeDream APP](https://bedream.xyz) to writing
- **BeDream APP** is a comprehensive AI roleplay and creative writing platform designed for immersive, unrestricted storytelling. Users can craft deeply detailed characters, build elaborate worlds and s

Fixes #11906

gist.headline: Dreaming in text
gist.blurb: The Greenhouse just got a little more imaginative! BeDream APP has joined the ecosystem, bringing unrestricted AI roleplay and world-building to our community.
gist.summary: Added BeDream APP, a comprehensive AI roleplay and creative writing platform, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Writers and roleplayers can now discover BeDream in the Greenhouse to craft detailed characters and build elaborate worlds.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee engaging in creative writing and dreaming up fantasy worlds. Metaphors include magical books, glowing journals, and tiny fantasy elements like castles or stars to represent roleplay and storytelling.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting in a comfortable armchair and writing in a glowing magical journal. A thought bubble above her shows a tiny pixelated fantasy castle and stars. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
